summary: Frontend-only end-to-end testing of OICE landing page completed. Verified all 12 sections render with correct data-testids, routing for /app and /simulation works, smooth-scroll nav, stats counters, mobile menu, placeholders, back-to-home links. Found and fixed one bug: DNA graph React Flow edges were not rendering due to missing <Handle> components in the custom NodeChip. After fix, 9 animated edges connect 7 nodes as required. Console clean (0 warnings after fix).

ui_bugs.issue: FIXED. Custom React Flow node was missing Handle components, so all 9 edges silently failed to render with console warnings 'Couldn't create edge for source handle id: undefined'. Spec required animated edges connecting innovation -> contributions -> funding/milestone -> rewards.

issues: Console emits a non-blocking React Flow warning: 'It looks like you've created a new nodeTypes object. ... memoize them.' nodeTypes object in DNAGraph.jsx is already defined at module scope (const nodeTypes = { chip: NodeChip }), so this warning likely originates from another React Flow instance (e.g. Solution/Features mock previews). Cosmetic only.
Hero is centered well at 1920px; mobile (390px) layout looks clean; mobile menu drawer opens correctly via mobile-menu-toggle and shows About/How it works/Features/Tech/Docs + Launch App.

action_items: Re-verify the DNA graph fix visually (already verified by testing agent — 9 edges rendered, 0 console warnings).
Optional: memoize nodeTypes in any other component that uses React Flow to silence the remaining non-blocking warning.
critical_code_review_comments: DNAGraph custom node lacked Handle/Position imports — React Flow silently failed all edges. This pattern (custom node + connections) should always include <Handle type='source'/> and <Handle type='target'/>. Fix applied with transparent styling to keep design clean.

AppPlaceholder and SimulationPlaceholder use framer-motion initial={{opacity:0}} which momentarily renders the page as visually empty during nav transition. Functional, but a brief flash of empty screen happens (~150ms). Consider initial opacity 0.001 or set animate first frame synchronously if a snappier feel is desired.

Landing.jsx adds a global click listener for anchor smooth-scroll — works correctly; nav-link-about/how/features/tech/docs all scroll to correct sections (verified scrollY changes 1755/4123/6015/1835/9177).
All required data-testids (29 root + 8 how-steps + 6 stats) present and used consistently via TID constants module — excellent testability.
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/components/DNAGraph.jsx (added Handle, Position imports + invisible source/target handles in NodeChip)
seed_data_creation: None — pure marketing landing page, no API calls.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing page is solid. All routing (/app, /simulation, back-to-home) works. All 8 how-steps, 6 stats, 4 pillars, 6 features bento cards, mobile menu toggle verified. DNA graph now renders 7 nodes + 9 animated React Flow edges (was 0 edges before fix). Only one cosmetic React Flow warning remains about nodeTypes memoization that doesn't affect rendering. If retesting, watch out that .first selector on duplicate testids (desktop nav vs mobile menu) can pick the hidden desktop one — use .last or scope inside the mobile drawer.
rca_of_the_issue: DNAGraph.jsx defined a custom node type 'chip' (NodeChip component) but did NOT render any <Handle> components inside it. React Flow requires each connectable node to expose at least one <Handle type='source'/> and one <Handle type='target'/> for edges to attach (since edges in this file don't specify sourceHandle/targetHandle ids, React Flow looks up the default handle, which was missing -> 'source handle id: undefined' warning x18 + 0 edge SVG paths drawn). FIX: imported {Handle, Position} from 'reactflow' and added invisible (opacity:0, transparent background) <Handle type='target' position={Position.Left}/> and <Handle type='source' position={Position.Right}/> inside the NodeChip motion.div. Result: 9 of 9 edges render with animated dashed lines and arrow markers, matching the design intent. Verified via DOM count .react-flow__edge=9, .react-flow__edge-path=9, and screenshot.
